message:
fix(timer): wrapping-safe generation comparison in timer heap ordering

The TimerEntry Ord implementation compared generations with plain cmp(), which
produces incorrect ordering when the u64 generation counter wraps around
(after 2^64 increments). Replace with wrapping_sub + i64 cast comparison so
that entries with close-but-wrapped generations still sort correctly.

This is the standard technique for wrapping sequence number comparison: if
the difference fits in i64 range (which it always does for entries that are
at most half the u64 space apart), the signed comparison gives the intended
ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
